name: grok
descriptionTemplate: Grok as a peer implementer for {{host}}: default integration=direct lands live-tree edits for one-shot code (no consent gate; ACP peer always external worktree; stop-time apply); auto/review are opt-in worktrees; ACP is the default peer channel (runMode direct is a separate installed-home security posture). Review, reason, verify, continue-run, and verified handoff included. See plugin/references/integration-modes.md. Not affiliated with xAI.

runMode.title: Run mode
runMode.description: Security posture (orthogonal to integration): hardened (default; private home + sandbox) or direct (installed Grok CLI / normal home). Not how edits land - see integrationMode and plugin/references/integration-modes.md.

integrationMode.title: Integration mode
integrationMode.description: How edits land (orthogonal to runMode): direct = product default live-tree (one-shot code; ACP peer stop-time apply after always-external worktree; no consent gate); auto/review = opt-in worktrees. userConfig is a hint only. SSOT: plugin/references/integration-modes.md.

notificationMode.title: Completion notifications
notificationMode.description: off, auto (background runs only), native, or webhook

interface.shortDescription: Peer implementer for Codex: live-tree code default, ACP peer stop-time apply, verified handoff
interface.longDescription: Grok as a peer implementer for Codex CLI and the ChatGPT desktop app. Product default is integration=direct: live-tree edits for one-shot code (no consent gate); ACP peer always uses an external worktree and applies only at ready peer-stop (direct/auto apply; review retains). Auto and review are opt-in isolated worktrees for code. ACP is the default multi-turn peer channel (opt out with GROK_DISABLE_ACP=1); one-shot code is the fallback. runMode is a separate security axis: hardened (default private home + sandbox) vs runMode direct (installed Grok CLI / normal home). Iterate with continue-run; integrate through mode-aware verified handoff / peer-stop. Review, reason, and verify included. Canonical matrix: plugin/references/integration-modes.md. Every mode emits exactly one machine-readable JSON result envelope. The Python engine is bundled inside the plugin install tree so marketplace cache installs work without env hacks. Not affiliated with xAI.
defaultPrompt: Run the grok preflight skill and summarize readiness.
Use the grok review skill on the current change set and report correctness bugs.
Use the grok reason skill to critique this architecture decision.
Use the grok implement skill to fix a bug and verify the handoff.
